libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test execution, set runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` for `io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1` or for Vert.x versions resolving Netty 4.2.x. Meaningful tests can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server on localhost; no external service is needed. Avoid OAuth2WebClient-specific tests unless intentionally adding its optional OAuth2 dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative; the issue may still expose additional reachability metadata gaps after the Netty/JDK 25 runtime properties are applied.
If tests exercise optional Web Client features such as OAuth2WebClient, additional optional Vert.x auth dependencies may be needed, but they are not required for core WebClient coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is required for normal Vert.x Web Client coverage, but native-image runs on JDK 25 need the Netty unsafe/reflection system properties because vertx-web-client 5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final and the existing 5.0.0 test already documents this requirement for Vert.x 5/Netty 4.2.x.
